text.en:
Hi {first_name},

I wanted to follow up on my previous message about the opportunity I mentioned. I think it would be a great fit for someone with your experience.

Would you be interested in learning more?

Best regards,
{recruiter_name}

text.en:
Hi {first_name},

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out about an exciting opportunity that might interest you based on your background in {specialty}.

Would you be available for a quick chat this week?

Best regards,
{recruiter_name}

varValue.code:
[
  {
    id: 0,
    step_type: "initial",
    type: "sms",
    title: "Initial Outreach",
    startDate: null,
    messageBody: "Hi ,\n\nI wanted to reach out about an exciting travel nursing opportunity in Texas. Based on your background, I think you’d be a great fit! Are you open to learning more?",
    includeOptOut: true,
    media: null
  },
  {
    id: 0,
    step_type: "follow-up",
    type: "sms",
    title: "Follow Up 1",
    startDate: null,
    messageBody: "Just checking in to see if you had a chance to look at my previous message about the role in Texas. It offers great pay and benefits. Would you like me to send the full details?",
    includeOptOut: true,
    media: null
  },
  {
    id: 0,
    step_type: "follow-up",
    type: "sms",
    title: "Follow Up 2",
    startDate: null,
    messageBody: "Hi,\n\nI didn’t want you to miss out on this opportunity in Texas. If now’s not the right time, that’s totally fine — but if you’re interested, I can send everything over today.",
    includeOptOut: true,
    media: null
  }
]

Following up on the ICU positions...
Hi {{name}}, looking for ER nurses in Texas...
Just checking in about the ER positions...
Hi {{name}}, great Med-Surg opportunities in Florida...
Following up about the Med-Surg positions...

New Message
